---
title: "Estimating a VAR model in R"
description: "Short description of what this note does — one sentence, it appears in the listing and in search results."
author: "Andrés Martínez Glez"
date: "2026-07-22"
categories: [VAR, time series, R]
---

## Motivation

[Text]

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| message: false
library(vars)
```

[Your existing R chunks paste in unchanged from the .Rmd]
